title: uragoga dalzellii
side_effects: Uragoga dalzellii can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, nausea, and diarrhea due to its high levels of saponins and other phytochemicals. Excessive consumption can lead to headaches, dizziness, and even respiratory problems in some individuals. In rare cases, uragoga dalzellii may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, resulting in adverse reactions. It's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using uragoga dalzellii for medicinal purposes to avoid potential side effects.
